name: Vessel - If I Have To Survive, I'll Do It Here
description:
- Most nights, I fear
That I'm not enough
I've had my share of Monday mornings when I can't get up
But when hope is lost
And I come undone -
--
--
--
AN: "Okay, so... I know that I missed a bot release date. The truth is, I haven't been doing too good. And It has drained me of all my creativity and snatched my motivation away from me. I'm at the point where I'm lost on what to create. It sucks... but I'm trying..."
